ambiguities.description: Metric definitions, formulas, and semantic ownership
Data sources, schemas, and freshness requirements
Access control and data sensitivity levels
Export and share requirements (PDF, CSV, embed, API)
Data quality, lineage, and trust requirements
Ownership of metric semantics and change governance
Dashboard vs embedded analytics vs self-service exploration

questions.question: What metrics and KPIs must be tracked?
What are the data sources and their schemas?
What dimensions and filters are required?
Who can access which dashboards and metrics?
What export and sharing capabilities are required?
What alerting thresholds and channels are needed?
How much historical data must be backfilled?
Is this dashboard-only, embedded, or self-service analytics?
What is the MVP dashboard set and who is the audience?

assumptions.assumption: Standard batch data pipelines are sufficient for MVP refresh
Web-based dashboards are the primary consumption form

suggested_closures.decision: Analytics construction will separate metric definitions, data ingestion, and presentation layers.
suggested_closures.rationale: Separation ensures metric semantics are owned independently of dashboards, and supports multiple consumption forms.

seed_tasks.title: Define metric catalog and ownership
seed_tasks.transformation: Document every metric, its formula, data source, and semantic owner.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Metric catalog exists with formulas and owners.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every metric can be recomputed from its documented formula and source.

seed_tasks.title: Map data sources and freshness requirements
seed_tasks.transformation: List all data sources, schemas, update frequency, and freshness SLAs.
seed_tasks.evidence_requirement: Data source inventory with freshness SLAs exists.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Every metric has a traceable data source and freshness commitment.

seed_tasks.title: Define MVP dashboard set and audience
seed_tasks.transformation: Select initial dashboards, their audience, and required dimensions/filters.
seed_tasks.review_predicate: Each dashboard has defined metrics, audience, and access level.

residuals.description: Metric definitions and catalog are not established.
Data sources and schemas are not documented.
Refresh cadence and freshness SLAs are not defined.
Access control and data sensitivity levels are not defined.
MVP dashboard set and audience are not selected.
